verification_gate: git-kb doctor passes; board/ready/context return live data; MCP server registers in Claude Code proven by a tool call; no secret values printed.
proof_summary: Exercised the GitKB planning plane from the meta root (/home/flexnetos/meta) against the live .kb store. `git-kb doctor` exits 0 with 7 checks passed (the single warning is a missing [repos] section, not the gated [user] section). `board`, `ready`, and `context` all return live data (16 draft / 83 completed, a scored ready task tasks/meta-diff-claude-to-codex-wiring @76.4, and a JSON bootstrap bundle). config.toml has a [user] section (name=drdave-flexnteos, email present). The `git-kb mcp` server was driven over stdio JSON-RPC: initialize returned serverInfo gitkb/0.2.12, tools/list returned 49 kb_* tools, and a live tools/call of kb_board returned real board content with isError=false. No secret values were printed by any command; [auth.api_keys] key values were not read.
